name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Direct income support of Rs 6000 per year to small and marginal farmer families, paid in 3 equal installments of Rs 2000 each.
benefits: Rs 6000/year in 3 installments of Rs 2000 directly to bank account
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Common Service Center (CSC) or apply online at pmkisan.gov.in

name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
description: Free health insurance coverage of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Covers pre and post hospitalization expenses.
benefits: Rs 5 lakh health insurance per family per year, cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Ayushman Bharat center or call 14555. Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in

name: National Food Security Act - Ration Card
description: Subsidized food grains (rice at Rs 3/kg, wheat at Rs 2/kg, coarse grains at Rs 1/kg) for eligible families under the public distribution system.
benefits: 5 kg food grains per person per month at subsidized rates
how_to_apply: Apply at district food and civil supplies office or state food portal

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin
description: Financial assistance for construction of pucca house with basic amenities for rural homeless and those living in kutcha houses.
benefits: Rs 1.20 lakh in plains and Rs 1.30 lakh in hilly areas for house construction
how_to_apply: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG gas connection to women from below poverty line (BPL) households to replace unclean cooking fuels.
benefits: Free LPG connection, first refill free, stove provided
how_to_apply: Visit nearest LPG distributor with documents

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases. Very low premium rates.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss. Premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial crops
how_to_apply: Apply through bank, CSC, or insurance company before sowing season

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child. High interest rate savings account for education and marriage expenses of girl children below 10 years.
benefits: High interest rate (currently ~8%), tax-free maturity, minimum Rs 250/year deposit
how_to_apply: Open account at any post office or authorized bank

name: MGNREGA
description: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer for unskilled manual work.
benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment at minimum wage (Rs 200-300/day depending on state)
how_to_apply: Apply for Job Card at Gram Panchayat, then demand work in writing

name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers. Rs 3000 monthly pension after age 60.
benefits: Rs 3000/month pension after age 60. Contribution: Rs 55-200/month based on entry age
how_to_apply: Visit nearest CSC with documents. Entry age 18-40 years.

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Zero balance bank account with RuPay debit card, Rs 2 lakh accident insurance, and Rs 30,000 life insurance for unbanked citizens.
benefits: Zero balance account, RuPay card, Rs 2 lakh accident insurance, Rs 30,000 life insurance, overdraft up to Rs 10,000
documents_required: Aadhaar Card or any ID proof
how_to_apply: Visit any bank branch or Bank Mitra (banking correspondent)

name: PM MUDRA Yojana
description: Collateral-free loans up to Rs 10 lakh for non-farm small business activities. Three categories: Shishu (up to Rs 50,000), Kishore (Rs 50,000 to Rs 5 lakh), Tarun (Rs 5 lakh to Rs 10 lakh).
benefits: Collateral-free business loans. Shishu: up to Rs 50,000. Kishore: up to Rs 5 lakh. Tarun: up to Rs 10 lakh
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI branch

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed pension scheme for unorganized sector workers. Monthly pension of Rs 1000 to Rs 5000 after age 60 based on contribution.
benefits: Monthly pension Rs 1000-5000 after age 60. Government co-contributes 50% for 5 years for eligible subscribers
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank branch. Age 18-40 years.

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme with Rs 2 lakh coverage at premium of just Rs 436 per year for ages 18-50.
benefits: Rs 2 lakh life insurance cover at Rs 436/year premium. Auto-debit from bank account
how_to_apply: Enroll at any bank branch or through internet banking. Age 18-50.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance with Rs 2 lakh for accidental death and Rs 1 lakh for partial disability at just Rs 20 per year.
benefits: Rs 2 lakh accidental death cover, Rs 1 lakh partial disability cover at Rs 20/year
how_to_apply: Enroll at any bank branch. Age 18-70.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Gramin
description: Financial assistance for construction of individual household toilets in rural areas to eliminate open defecation.
benefits: Rs 12,000 incentive for toilet construction. Technical support for construction.
documents_required: BPL list inclusion or Gram Panchayat recommendation
how_to_apply: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Free soil testing and health card for farmers with crop-wise nutrient recommendations to improve productivity and reduce fertilizer costs.
benefits: Free soil testing every 2 years. Personalized fertilizer recommendations. Reduces input costs.
how_to_apply: Contact local agriculture department or Krishi Vigyan Kendra. Soil sample collected from your field.

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Cash incentive of Rs 5000 for pregnant and lactating women for first living child to compensate wage loss and ensure proper nutrition.
benefits: Rs 5000 in 3 installments during pregnancy and after delivery for first child
how_to_apply: Register at nearest Anganwadi center or sub-health center

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: Central and state government scholarships for students from economically weaker sections, SC/ST/OBC/Minority communities for education from class 1 to PhD.
benefits: Scholarships ranging from Rs 500/month to Rs 20,000/month depending on scheme and level of study
how_to_apply: Apply online at scholarships.gov.in. Deadlines vary by scheme.

name: Stand Up India
description: Bank loans between Rs 10 lakh and Rs 1 crore to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for setting up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading.
benefits: Composite loan Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore. Covers 75% of project cost. Repayment up to 7 years.
how_to_apply: Apply at any scheduled commercial bank branch or through standupmitra.in portal

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Provides farmers with timely credit for agriculture, animal husbandry, and fisheries at subsidized interest rates (4% effective rate).
benefits: Credit at 4% interest (with prompt repayment). ATM-enabled card. Crop insurance included. Limit based on land holding.
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank branch. Existing bank account holders can apply directly.
